The dog stood quietly in the center of the ring. Everyone at the show wanted to see the dog up close. A young girl reached out to touch the dog. The judge walked slowly around the dog and made some notes. Photographers leaned in to capture the dog in good light. The owner gently brushed the dog before the next round. People in the crowd pointed at the dog and smiled. The dog turned toward the sound of the applause. After the show, the dog rested quietly in the shade. Many visitors agreed the dog was the finest one there.
